profiles.label: Computational materials science and AI4Science
profiles.summary: Research in computational materials science, materials informatics, AI4Science, high-throughput simulation, density functional theory, molecular dynamics, machine learning for materials, scientific foundation models, autonomous discovery, and HPC-enabled materials design.

profiles.label: Computational biophysics, protein folding, and interactions
profiles.summary: Research in computational biophysics, protein folding, protein-protein and protein-ligand interactions, molecular simulation, structure prediction, biomolecular dynamics, statistical mechanics, AI-assisted protein modeling, and mechanistic modeling of biomolecular systems.
